allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node | Select-Object -Property Source; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs', 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs' -Filter 'node.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; if \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvs"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvs" -Recurse -Filter node.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName }; if \(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" -Recurse -Filter node.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName })

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, @{n='Cmd';e={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).CommandLine}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell($env:Path = 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;' + $env:Path; Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd' -ArgumentList 'run','dev' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\johnc\\videospots' -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "OK status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { "Failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
